title: Custom Lives
description: A simple life system plugin for your server!
body:
![player at 3 lives](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b2b11d59024a12801e29c1019f61bc7a25ba35a.png)Custom Lives is a simple life system plugin that adds extra challenge to your server.

Features:
- Players start with 3 lives
- Each death removes 1 life
- When a player reaches 0 lives, they are automatically banned from the server
- Lightweight and easy to use

Commands:

**/setlives <player> <amount>** _(set the lives of any player **OP Required**)_

**/givelife <player>** _(gives 1 of your lives to a player of your choosing.)_
